steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( ! class_exists( 'Mahangu_Troll_Trap' ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: main class not loaded' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: plugin loads, options round-trip' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_set_current_user( 1 ); $bulk = apply_filters( 'bulk_actions-edit-comments', array() ); if ( ! isset( $bulk['mark_as_troll'] ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: mark_as_troll bulk action missing' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( ! isset( $bulk['untrap'] ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: untrap bulk action missing' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: both bulk actions registered' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_set_current_user( 1 ); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'untrap target', 'comment_author' => 'tester', 'comment_author_email' => 'tester@example.com' ) ); if ( ! $cid ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: could not create test comment' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', 'piglatin' ); $_REQUEST['_wpnonce'] = wp_create_nonce( 'bulk-comments' ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $tt->settings->handle_bulk_actions( '', 'untrap', array( $cid ) ); $result = get_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', true ); if ( $result !== 'none' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: untrap did not clear filter, got: ' . var_export( $result, true ) . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: untrap clears _trolltrap_filter to none' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_set_current_user( 1 ); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'mark target', 'comment_author' => 'tester2', 'comment_author_email' => 'tester2@example.com' ) ); update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', 'none' ); $_REQUEST['_wpnonce'] = wp_create_nonce( 'bulk-comments' ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $tt->settings->handle_bulk_actions( '', 'mark_as_troll', array( $cid ) ); $result = get_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', true ); if ( $result !== 'disemvowel' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: mark_as_troll did not set default filter (disemvowel), got: ' . var_export( $result, true ) . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: mark_as_troll still applies default filter (regression check)' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_set_current_user( 1 ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $_REQUEST = array( 'bulk_untrap_comments' => 2 ); ob_start(); $tt->settings->handle_bulk_actions_notice(); $out = ob_get_clean(); if ( strpos( $out, 'Untrapped 2 comments.' ) === false ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: untrap notice text missing or wrong. Got: ' . $out . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } $_REQUEST = array( 'bulk_troll_comments' => 1 ); ob_start(); $tt->settings->handle_bulk_actions_notice(); $out = ob_get_clean(); if ( strpos( $out, 'Marked 1 comment as Troll.' ) === false ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: mark notice text missing or wrong. Got: ' . $out . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: bulk action notices render correctly (singular + plural)' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $c = mahangu_troll_trap()->convert; $rev = $c->reverse( 'héllo wörld' ); if ( ! mb_check_encoding( $rev, 'UTF-8' ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: reverse produced invalid UTF-8' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $rev !== 'olléh dlröw' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: multibyte reverse wrong, got: ' . $rev . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } $multi = $c->pig_latin( 'line one' . PHP_EOL . 'line two' ); if ( strpos( $multi, PHP_EOL ) === false ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: pig_latin collapsed the newline' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: converters are multibyte- and whitespace-safe' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $reg = mahangu_troll_trap()->filters; if ( ! ( $reg instanceof Mahangu_Troll_Trap_Filters ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: filter registry not available' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $reg->apply( 'disemvowel', 'Hello World' ) !== 'Hll Wrld' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: registry apply(disemvowel) wrong' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $reg->apply( 'none', 'Hello World' ) !== 'Hello World' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: registry apply(none) should be identity' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $reg->apply( 'bogus-slug', 'Hello World' ) !== 'Hello World' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: registry apply(unknown) should be identity' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( in_array( 'none', array_keys( $reg->transforming() ), true ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: transforming() must exclude none' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( count( $reg->slugs() ) < 4 ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: expected at least 4 registered filters' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: filter registry registered and dispatching' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $reg = mahangu_troll_trap()->filters; foreach ( array( 'leetspeak', 'mocking', 'uwu', 'rot13', 'zalgo' ) as $slug ) { if ( ! $reg->has( $slug ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: filter ' . $slug . ' not registered' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } $out = $reg->apply( $slug, 'héllo Wörld 123' ); if ( ! mb_check_encoding( $out, 'UTF-8' ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: ' . $slug . ' produced invalid UTF-8' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } } if ( $reg->apply( 'rot13', $reg->apply( 'rot13', 'Hello' ) ) !== 'Hello' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: rot13 not self-inverse' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $reg->apply( 'uwu', 'really' ) !== 'weawwy' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: uwu wrong' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: new transforms registered and producing valid UTF-8' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option( 'trolltrap_words', 'alpha' . PHP_EOL . 'beta' . PHP_EOL . 'gamma' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_graduated_enabled', '1' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_severity_ladder', array( 1 => 'piglatin', 2 => 'reverse', 3 => 'disemvowel' ) ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $two = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'alpha and beta here', 'comment_author' => 'grad2', 'comment_author_email' => 'grad2@example.com' ) ); $tt->comments_tag( $two ); if ( get_comment_meta( $two, '_trolltrap_match_count', true ) != 2 ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: expected match count 2' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( get_comment_meta( $two, '_trolltrap_filter', true ) !== 'reverse' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: rung 2 should map to reverse' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } $three = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'alpha beta gamma', 'comment_author' => 'grad3', 'comment_author_email' => 'grad3@example.com' ) ); $tt->comments_tag( $three ); if ( get_comment_meta( $three, '_trolltrap_filter', true ) !== 'disemvowel' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: rung 3+ should map to disemvowel' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } $zero = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'a perfectly clean remark', 'comment_author' => 'grad0', 'comment_author_email' => 'grad0@example.com' ) ); $tt->comments_tag( $zero ); if ( get_comment_meta( $zero, '_trolltrap_filter', true ) !== 'none' ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: no match should be none' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: graduated severity ladder maps match count to filter' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); if ( ! ( $tt->ai instanceof Mahangu_Troll_Trap_AI ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: AI feature object missing' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( $tt->ai->is_available() ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: AI should be unavailable with no key configured' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( in_array( 'llm', $tt->filters->slugs(), true ) ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: llm filter should not register while AI is unavailable' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } if ( '' === $tt->ai->fallback_slug() ) { fwrite( STDERR, 'FAIL: AI fallback slug should resolve to a filter' . PHP_EOL ); exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: AI rewrite feature is gated off by default' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option( 'trolltrap_words', 'badger' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_default_filter', 'disemvowel' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_graduated_enabled', '0' ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'badger nonsense', 'comment_author' => 'render-test', 'comment_author_email' => 'render-test@example.com' ) ); $tt->comments_tag( $cid ); $stored = get_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', true ); if ( $stored !== 'disemvowel' ) { echo 'FAIL: keyword-matching did not set the disemvowel filter, got: ' . var_export( $stored, true ) . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } $comment = get_comment( $cid ); $rendered = apply_filters( 'comment_text', $comment->comment_content, $comment ); if ( strpos( $rendered, 'bdgr nnsns' ) === false ) { echo 'FAIL: comment_text did not run through disemvowel, got: ' . var_export( $rendered, true ) . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } if ( strpos( $rendered, 'badger' ) !== false ) { echo 'FAIL: original keyword leaked through comment_text, got: ' . var_export( $rendered, true ) . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: comment_text filter renders trapped comment through chosen transform' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option( 'trolltrap_words', 'badger' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_default_filter', 'disemvowel' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_graduated_enabled', '0' ); wp_set_current_user( 1 ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'badger content', 'comment_author' => 'col-test', 'comment_author_email' => 'col-test@example.com' ) ); $tt->comments_tag( $cid ); ob_start(); $tt->settings->admin_column_output( 'trolltrap', $cid ); $out = ob_get_clean(); if ( strpos( $out, 'Matched graylist keywords' ) === false ) { echo 'FAIL: admin column missing matched-keywords caption. Deactivate' ) ); if ( ! is_array( $links ) || count( $links ) < 2 ) { echo 'FAIL: plugin_action_links did not return the prepended link. Got: ' . var_export( $links, true ) . <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'ai regen target', 'comment_author' => 'regen', 'comment_author_email' => 'regen@example.com' ) ); update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', 'llm' ); update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_llm_text', 'a stale rewrite from a prior run' ); update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_llm_attempts', 2 ); if ( null === $tt->ai->cached_text( $cid ) ) { echo 'FAIL: precondition failed, cached_text returned null before regenerate' . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } if ( '' !== get_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_llm_attempts', true ) ) { echo 'FAIL: successful rewrite should clear the attempts counter, got: ' . var_export( get_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_llm_attempts', true ), true ) . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: run_transform retries a 503 then caches on success' . PHP_EOL;

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; update_option( 'trolltrap_ai_enabled', '1' ); update_option( 'trolltrap_ai_key', 'sk-ant-test-fake' ); $tt = mahangu_troll_trap(); $cid = wp_insert_comment( array( 'comment_post_ID' => 1, 'comment_content' => 'retry-after test', 'comment_author' => 'ra', 'comment_author_email' => 'ra@example.com' ) ); update_comment_meta( $cid, '_trolltrap_filter', 'llm' ); wp_clear_scheduled_hook( 'trolltrap_ai_transform', array( $cid ) ); add_filter( 'pre_http_request', function( $pre, $args, $url ) { if ( strpos( $url, 'api.anthropic.com' ) === false ) { return $pre; } $h = new WpOrg\Requests\Response\Headers(); $h['retry-after'] = '600'; return array( 'response' => array( 'code' => 429, 'message' => 'Too Many Requests' ), 'body' => '', 'headers' => $h, 'cookies' => array(), 'filename' => null ); }, 10, 3 ); $before = time(); $tt->ai->run_transform( $cid ); $next = wp_next_scheduled( 'trolltrap_ai_transform', array( $cid ) ); if ( ! $next ) { echo 'FAIL: cron event was not rescheduled after a 429 with Retry-After' . PHP_EOL; exit( 1 ); } echo 'OK: 429 with Retry-After=600 schedules the retry at least ~600s out' . PHP_EOL;
